# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types:
      - opened
      - synchronize
      - reopened
      - edited

jobs:
  build-and-notify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      PR_HEAD_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      PR_BASE_REF: ${{ github.event.pull_request.base.ref }}
      COMMIT_MESSAGE: Deploy PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Running build for PR #$PR_NUMBER"
          echo "Title: $PR_TITLE"
          echo "Description:"
          echo "$PR_BODY"
          echo "Build your project here"

      - name: Create deployment commit using PR title
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git commit --allow-empty -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE"

      - name: Send build notification
        env:
          NOTIFICATION_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          NOTIFICATION_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
        run: |
          payload=$(jq -n \
            --arg pr_number "$PR_NUMBER" \
            --arg pr_title "$NOTIFICATION_TITLE" \
            --arg pr_body "$NOTIFICATION_BODY" \
            --arg pr_url "$PR_URL" \
            --arg base_ref "$PR_BASE_REF" \
            --arg head_ref "$PR_HEAD_REF" \
            --arg commit_message "$COMMIT_MESSAGE" \
            '{
              text: ("Build notification for PR #" + $pr_number + ": " + $pr_title),
              pr_number: $pr_number,
              pr_title: $pr_title,
              pr_body: $pr_body,
              pr_url: $pr_url,
              base_ref: $base_ref,
              head_ref: $head_ref,
              commit_message: $commit_message
            }')
          echo "$payload"
          # Example webhook usage:
          # curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$payload" "$WEBHOOK_URL"
